title: 'Celtic assess Dundee goalkeeper McCracken' - gossip
summary: Celtic are reportedly monitoring Dundee goalkeeper McCracken as a potential recruit, while also showing interest in a Hibernian midfielder. The interest comes as Motherwell manager Jens Berthel Askou addresses speculation about his own future.
content: Celtic are being linked with a Dundee goalkeeper and Hibernian midfielder as Motherwell manager Jens Berthel Askou addresses speculation about his future.

zh.title: 凯尔特人评估邓迪门神麦克拉肯
zh.summary: 据报道，凯尔特人正在监测邓迪门神麦克拉肯作为潜在引援目标，同时也对希伯尼安的一名中场球员感兴趣。这一兴趣的出现正值母威尔经理延斯·贝尔特尔·阿斯库处理关于自己前景的猜测之时。

title: Why Real Madrid tie could make or break Kane's Ballon d'Or hopes
summary: Harry Kane leads Europe's goalscorers but faces uncertainty about his Ballon d'Or prospects without a major trophy win. A crucial match against Real Madrid could prove decisive in determining whether he has a legitimate chance at the prestigious individual award.
content: Harry Kane is the leading goalscorer in Europe but does he need to win a major trophy to have a chance of winning the prestigious award?

zh.title: 为什么皇马对阵可能决定凯恩的金球奖前景
zh.summary: 哈里·凯恩领跑欧洲射手榜，但在没有重大锦标赛胜利的情况下，他的金球奖前景面临不确定性。对皇马的一场关键比赛可能会在决定他是否有机会获得这一享有盛誉的个人奖项方面发挥决定性作用。

title: How Sporting hero Gyokeres could end European run
summary: Viktor Gyokeres returns to face his former club Sporting, where he left a legendary impact, as Arsenal battles to advance to the Champions League semi-finals. The standoff pits the prolific striker against the team that launched his European reputation.
content: Viktor Gyokeres' impact at Sporting will never be forgotten, but he returns on Tuesday hoping to help fire Arsenal into the Champions League semi-finals.

zh.title: 体育英雄久克雷斯如何可能结束欧洲之旅
zh.summary: 维克托·久克雷斯回归对阵他的前东家体育队，在那里他留下了传奇的影响，同时阿森纳为推进欧冠半决赛而奋力。这场对峙将这位多产的前锋与为他建立欧洲声誉的球队对立。

title: 54 years, 48 leagues, 2,000 grounds - the ultimate football odyssey
summary: A dedicated UK groundhopper concludes a historic decades-long journey visiting 2,000 football grounds across 48 leagues over 54 years. BBC Sport documents the final chapter of this record-breaking odyssey.
content: BBC Sport travels with the UK's ultimate groundhopper to the final match of a decades-long, history-making journey.

zh.title: 54年、48个联赛、2000个球场——终极足球奥德赛
zh.summary: 一位专注的英国球场访客完成了跨越54年、造访48个联赛中2000个足球球场的历史性旅程。英国广播公司体育部记录了这场创纪录奥德赛的最后篇章。

title: James back with Minnesota after hospitalization
summary: Colombian star James Rodríguez, who was hospitalized last week for severe dehydration, returned to his MLS club Minnesota United FC on Monday to continue his ramp-up to game readiness.
content: Colombian star James Rodríguez, who was hospitalized last week for severe dehydration, returned to his MLS club Minnesota United FC on Monday to continue his ramp-up to game readiness.

zh.title: 詹姆斯住院后回归明尼苏达
zh.summary: 哥伦比亚球星詹姆斯·罗德里格斯因严重脱水上周住院，周一回到他的美职联俱乐部明尼苏达联队，继续为复出比赛做准备。

title: Arteta preaches calm ahead of Sporting quarterfinal
summary: Mikel Arteta has urged Arsenal's players not to panic as they aim to get their season back on track against Sporting Lisbon.
content: Mikel Arteta has urged Arsenal's players not to panic as they aim to get their season back on track against Sporting Lisbon.

zh.title: 阿尔特塔在葡萄牙体育四分之一决赛前呼吁保持冷静
zh.summary: 米克尔·阿尔特塔敦促阿森纳球员不要惊慌失措，因为他们的目标是在与葡萄牙体育队的比赛中重振赛季。

title: McKennie equals career best with goal in Juve win
summary: United States midfielder Weston McKennie scored for Juventus in a 2-0 win over Genoa Monday and was named man of the match.
content: United States midfielder Weston McKennie scored for Juventus in a 2-0 win over Genoa Monday and was named man of the match.

zh.title: 麦肯尼在尤文胜利中打进职业生涯最高进球数
zh.summary: 美国中场韦斯顿·麦肯尼周一在尤文图斯2-0击败热那亚的比赛中进球，被评为全场最佳。

title: Kane available for Bayern in first leg with Madrid
summary: Bayern Munich striker Harry Kane practiced on Monday and is expected to be available against Real Madrid in their Champions League quarterfinal on Tuesday.
content: Bayern Munich striker Harry Kane practiced on Monday and is expected to be available against Real Madrid in their Champions League quarterfinal on Tuesday.

zh.title: 凯恩在与马德里的首回合比赛中可能为拜仁出战
zh.summary: 拜仁慕尼黑前锋哈里·凯恩在周一进行了训练，预计将在周二的欧冠四分之一决赛中对阵皇家马德里时出场。
